sentences.arabic: الصَّلَاةُ هِيَ عِمَادُ الدِّينِ، وَهِيَ الصِّلَةُ الْمُبَاشِرَةُ بَيْنَ الْعَبْدِ وَخَالِقِهِ، حَيْثُ يَجِدُ فِيهَا الْمُؤْمِنُ الرَّاحَةَ وَالطُّمَأْنِينَةَ.
sentences.translation: Namaz je stub vjere i on je direktna veza između roba i njegovog Stvoritelja, u kojoj vjernik pronalazi odmor i smiraj.
sentences.translationEn: Prayer is the pillar of religion, and it is the direct connection between the servant and his Creator, wherein the believer finds rest and tranquility.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ: «أَرَأَيْتُمْ لَوْ أَنَّ نَهَرًا بِبَابِ أَحَدِكُمْ يَغْتَسِلُ مِنْهُ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ خَمْسَ مَرَّاتٍ، هَلْ يَبْقَى مِنْ دَرَنِهِ شَيْءٌ؟» قَالُوا: لَا يَبْقَى مِنْ دَرَنِهِ شَيْءٌ، قَالَ: «فَذَلِكَ مَثَلُ الصَّلَوَاتِ الْخَمْسِ، يَمْحُو اللهُ بِهِنَّ الْخَطَايَا» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ مَوَاقِيتِ الصَّلَاةِ، رَقْمُ ٥٢٨].
sentences.translation: Poslanik, s.a.v.s., je rekao: 'Šta mislite, kada bi ispred vrata nekog od vas proticala rijeka u kojoj bi se on kupao pet puta dnevno, da li bi na njemu ostalo imalo prljavštine?' Rekli su: 'Ne bi ostalo nimalo prljavštine.' Rekao je: 'To je primjer pet dnevnih namaza, njima Allah briše grijehe' [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o namaskim vremenima, br. 528].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (PBUH) said: 'Tell me, if there were a river at the door of one of you in which he washed five times a day, would any of his filth remain?' They said: 'No filth would remain.' He said: 'That is the example of the five prayers, with which Allah wipes away sins' [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of Times of Prayer, No. 528].

sentences.arabic: يُوَضِّحُ الشَّيْخُ ابْنُ عُثَيْمِينَ أَنَّ الْمُحَافَظَةَ عَلَى الصَّلَاةِ فِي أَوْقَاتِهَا مَعَ الْخُشُوعِ تُطَهِّرُ النَّفْسَ مِنَ الذُّنُوبِ وَالْمَعَاصِي.
sentences.translation: Šejh Ibn Usejmin objašnjava da čuvanje namaza u njegovim vremenima uz skrušenost (hušu') čisti dušu od grijeha i nepokornosti.
sentences.translationEn: Sheikh Ibn Uthaymeen explains that maintaining prayer at its prescribed times with humility (Khushu') purifies the soul from sins and disobedience.

sentences.arabic: لِذَا، يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يَتَعَلَّمَ أَحْكَامَهَا الصَّحِيحَةَ وَأَنْ يُؤَدِّيَهَا كَمَا أَمَرَ الشَّرْعُ.
sentences.translation: Zbog toga, musliman mora naučiti njegove ispravne propise i obavljati ga onako kako je Šerijat naredio.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, a Muslim must learn its correct rulings and perform it as the Sharia commanded.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِالْتِزَامَ بِهَذِهِ الْعِبَادَةِ يَعْصِمُ الْإِنْسَانَ مِنَ الْفَحْشَاءِ وَالْمُنْكَرِ.
sentences.translation: Pridržavanje ovog ibadeta čuva čovjeka od razvrata i zla.
sentences.translationEn: Commitment to this worship protects a person from immorality and wrongdoing.
